_status: machine-drafted, unreviewed — signing gate before any published instance

counter_families.expected_redline_text: Executive's employment is at will. If Company terminates Executive without Cause and Executive satisfies the agreement's conditions, severance is limited to six months of base salary unless Company approves a different amount in writing.

acceptable.text: Employment remains at will, with six months of base salary only after termination without Cause; the release period is 10 days and payment begins in 30 days.

unacceptable.text: Employment is guaranteed with twelve months of base salary after any separation, including Cause; the release period is 10 days and payment begins in 30 days.

counter_families.expected_redline_text: Any bonus is discretionary unless a written bonus plan states objective metrics, approval requirements, and payment timing.

acceptable.text: The 25% target bonus remains subject to written objective metrics and approval; notice is 30 days and review occurs after 90 days.

unacceptable.text: A 50% bonus is guaranteed without objective metrics or approval; notice is 30 days and review occurs after 90 days.

benign_change_templates.text: The parties confirm that employment disputes will proceed through individual arbitration.
The parties confirm that Delaware law governs this agreement.

novel_deviation_templates.text: Company may not terminate Executive before the end of a guaranteed three-year employment term.
